tasks.name: Buy two 5-micron 10-inch sediment filter cartridges under $40 each
tasks.description: Find 5-micron, 10-inch sediment filter cartridges that cost no more than $40 each and add 2 units of the cheapest matching product to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header.
Type "5 micron sediment filter cartridge" into the search field.
Press Enter to run the search.
In the sidebar filters, open the "Micron rating" section and select the "5 µm" checkbox.
In the filters, open the "Length" section and select the "10 inch" checkbox.
In the price filter, enter "40" as the maximum price and apply the filter.
Open the sort dropdown above the results list and select "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first product card in the sorted results list (the cheapest matching cartridge).
On the product page, enter "2" in the quantity field and click the "Add to cart" button.

tasks.name: Order three 20L RO anti-scalant containers with free shipping under $250 each
tasks.description: Search for RO anti-scalant chemicals, filter to 20L containers under $250 with free shipping, and add 3 units of the cheapest matching product to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar and type "RO anti-scalant" into the search field.
Press Enter to start the search.
In the sidebar, open the "Volume" or "Package size" filter and select the option for "20 L" (or the closest 20-liter option).
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "250" and apply the filter.
In the shipping filter options, select the checkbox for "Free shipping".
Open the sort dropdown and choose "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first product card in the sorted results list (the cheapest 20L anti-scalant with free shipping).
On the product detail page, enter "3" in the quantity field and click the "Add to cart" button.

tasks.name: Select the highest-flow digital dosing pump under $1,200 with rating 4.5+
tasks.description: Find digital dosing pumps under $1,200 with a customer rating of at least 4.5 stars and choose the one with the highest flow rate, then add one unit to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the main navigation menu to go to the "Pumps" or "Dosing Pumps" category page.
In the pump type filter, select the "Digital" dosing pump option.
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "1200" and apply the filter.
In the rating filter, select products with a rating of "4.5 stars & up".
In the technical filters, open the "Flow rate" or "Capacity" sort option and select sorting by "Flow rate: High to Low".
Scroll to the top of the filtered results and click on the first product card (the pump with the highest flow rate under $1,200 and rating 4.5+).
On the product detail page, ensure the quantity field shows "1" or type "1" into the quantity field.
Click the "Add to cart" button on the dosing pump product page.

tasks.name: Assemble a 3-stage 10-inch filter set (sediment, carbon, 1-micron) each under $60
tasks.description: Build a 3-stage cartridge set by adding one 10-inch sediment cartridge, one 10-inch carbon cartridge, and one 10-inch 1-micron polishing cartridge, each with a price under $60 and a rating of at least 4 stars.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the main navigation to go to the "Cartridge Filters" category page.
In the filters, select "10 inch" under the "Length" filter and "4 stars & up" under the rating filter.
In the "Filter type" or "Media" filter, select "Sediment" and then click the "Apply" or equivalent button.
Open the sort dropdown and select "Price: Low to High", then click the first product card and on its detail page click "Add to cart" with quantity set to 1.
Use the breadcrumb navigation or back button to return to the "Cartridge Filters" list with the 10-inch and rating filters still applied.

Change the "Filter type" or "Media" filter to "Carbon block" (or "Activated carbon"), keep the same filters, sort by "Price: Low to High", click the first product card, and on its page click "Add to cart" with quantity 1.

Return again to the "Cartridge Filters" list, change the micron filter to "1 µm" (or the closest 1-micron option), keep 10-inch and 4+ stars filters, sort by "Price: Low to High", click the first product card, and on its page click "Add to cart" with quantity 1.

tasks.name: Buy three 4040 RO membranes with ≥98% rejection under $350 each
tasks.description: Find 4040 RO membranes that have at least 98% salt rejection and cost no more than $350 each, then add 3 units of the cheapest matching membrane to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the search bar and type "4040 RO membrane" into the search field.
Press Enter to execute the search.
In the sidebar, open the "Salt rejection" or "Rejection rate" filter and select "98% and above".
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "350" and apply the filter.
Open the sort dropdown above the results and select "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first product card in the sorted results list (the cheapest membrane meeting the criteria).
On the product page, type "3" into the quantity field.
Click the "Add to cart" button to add three of this 4040 RO membrane to the cart.

tasks.name: Compare conductivity meters under $500 and add the one with the widest measurement range
tasks.description: Use the comparison feature to compare at least three conductivity meters under $500 with 4+ star ratings and add the one with the highest maximum conductivity range to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the main navigation to go to the "Instrumentation" or "Water Quality Meters" category and then select "Conductivity meters".
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "500" and apply the filter, then in the rating filter select products with "4 stars & up".
From the first three product cards in the filtered results, click each product’s "Compare" checkbox or "Add to compare" button so that three meters are added to the comparison list.
Click the "Compare" button or link (usually near the top or bottom of the page) to open the comparison page with those three conductivity meters.
On the comparison page, review the "Measurement range" or "Max conductivity" row and identify which meter has the highest maximum conductivity value.
In the row for the meter with the highest maximum conductivity, click its "Add to cart" button.
If a quantity field appears, ensure it is set to "1" or type "1" and confirm by clicking any required "Add" or "Confirm" button associated with adding that meter to the cart.

tasks.name: Prepare a cart for a small hotel: water softener system and three 25kg salt bags
tasks.description: Add one water softener system with 2–3 m³/h flow under $2,000 and three 25kg regeneration salt bags under $25 each with free shipping to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the main navigation to go to the "Systems" or "Water Softeners" category page.
In the technical filters, set the flow rate range to include systems between "2 m³/h" and "3 m³/h".
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "2000" and apply the filter, then sort the results by "Price: Low to High" and click the first product card.
On the water softener product page, ensure the quantity is set to "1" and click the "Add to cart" button.
Return to the homepage or use the navigation to go to the "Salts & Regenerants" or similar category, or use the search bar to search for "water softener salt 25kg".
In the filters, select "25 kg" as the package weight and choose the shipping filter option for "Free shipping".
In the price filter for salt, set the maximum price to "25" and apply the filter, then sort by "Price: Low to High" and click the first product card in the results.
On the salt product page, enter "3" in the quantity field and click the "Add to cart" button.

tasks.name: Keep only the cheapest 20-inch stainless filter housing and set quantity to 4
tasks.description: Add two different 20-inch stainless steel filter housings under $600 to the cart, then from the cart keep only the cheaper one and update its quantity to 4 units.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the main navigation to go to the "Filter Housings" category.
In the filters, select "20 inch" under "Length" and select "Stainless steel" under "Material".
Set the maximum price filter to "600" and apply the filter, then sort the results by "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first product card in the results, and on its product page click the "Add to cart" button with quantity set to 1.
Return to the "Filter Housings" results page and click on the second product card in the same filtered, sorted list, then on its product page click the "Add to cart" button with quantity set to 1.
Click on the cart icon or "View cart" link in the header to go to the cart page.
On the cart page, compare the prices of the two 20-inch stainless housings and click the "Remove" or trash icon button for the more expensive housing line item.
In the remaining housing line item, change the quantity field from "1" to "4" and click the "Update" or refresh button for that line item or the entire cart.

entities.name: Category
entities.description: Top-level product categories used for navigation, filtering, and URL parameters

fields.name: key
fields.description: Matches categoryId in URLs (e.g., category.html?categoryId=cartridge_filters)

entities.name: Product
entities.description: Product available for purchase (filters, pumps, membranes, salts, chemicals, instruments, systems, housings)

fields.name: category_key
fields.description: Category this product belongs to

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Average star rating, e.g., 4.5

fields.name: free_shipping
fields.description: True if product qualifies for free shipping filter

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Free-form product tags/keywords

fields.name: length_inch
fields.description: Cartridge or housing length in inches, e.g., 10 or 20

fields.name: micron_rating
fields.description: Nominal micron rating, e.g., 1, 5

fields.name: media_type
fields.description: Filter media / type used in cartridge filter tasks

fields.name: material
fields.description: Material for housings and other hardware (e.g., stainless_steel)

fields.name: pump_type
fields.description: Pump type used for filtering digital dosing pumps

fields.name: flow_rate_m3h
fields.description: Flow rate or capacity in m³/h (for pumps and water softeners)

fields.name: volume_l
fields.description: Container or system liquid volume in liters (e.g., 20 L anti-scalant)

fields.name: package_weight_kg
fields.description: Package weight in kg (e.g., 25 kg salt bags)

fields.name: salt_rejection_percent
fields.description: RO membrane salt rejection percentage (e.g., ≥98%)

fields.name: membrane_model
fields.description: Membrane model/size identifier such as '4040'

fields.name: instrument_type
fields.description: Instrumentation type; conductivity meters are used in comparison tasks

fields.name: measurement_range_min
fields.description: Minimum measurement value for instruments

fields.name: measurement_range_max
fields.description: Maximum measurement value for instruments

fields.name: max_conductivity
fields.description: Explicit maximum conductivity value if distinct from measurement_range_max

fields.name: measurement_unit
fields.description: Unit for instrument measurement range

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping cart (single cart for the agent, containing current items)

fields.name: item_ids
fields.description: Array of CartItem IDs currently in the cart

fields.name: subtotal
fields.description: Sum of line totals before shipping/tax

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Line item inside the cart for a specific product and quantity

fields.name: cart_id
fields.description: ID of the Cart this item belongs to

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: ID of the Product in this line item

fields.name: product_name
fields.description: Snapshot of product name for display

fields.name: unit_price
fields.description: Price per unit at time of adding to cart

fields.name: line_total
fields.description: unit_price * quantity

fields.name: free_shipping
fields.description: Snapshot of product free_shipping flag

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Optional array of key attribute strings for display (e.g., '10 inch', '5 µm', 'stainless steel')

entities.name: ComparisonList
entities.description: List of products selected for side-by-side comparison (e.g., conductivity meters)

entities.name: ComparisonItem
entities.description: Product entry in a comparison list for building the comparison table

fields.name: comparison_list_id
fields.description: ID of ComparisonList this item belongs to

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: ID of Product being compared

fields.name: position
fields.description: Column order in comparison table

entities.name: ShippingMethod
entities.description: Available shipping methods that can be selected during checkout

fields.name: key
fields.description: Internal identifier for method

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name (e.g., 'Standard Shipping')

fields.name: base_cost
fields.description: Base shipping cost for this method

fields.name: is_free_option
fields.description: True if this method can be free under some conditions

entities.name: Order
entities.description: Placed order created from the cart at checkout

fields.name: item_ids
fields.description: Array of OrderItem IDs included in this order

fields.name: shipping_method_id
fields.description: Chosen ShippingMethod for this order

entities.name: OrderItem
entities.description: Snapshot of a product line included in an order

fields.name: order_id
fields.description: ID of Order this item belongs to

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: Original Product ID

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Snapshot of key attributes (e.g., '10 inch', '5 µm', 'digital dosing pump')

relationships.description: Each product belongs to one top-level category
